channel.title: RSS Aggregator Feed
channel.description: An aggregated feed of Technology-related news

item.title: Canvas school login portals hacked as Instructure hack apparently gets even worse
item.description: ShinyHunters really wants a pay day, and has moved the deadline again.

item.title: DJI teases the dual-camera Osmo Pocket 4P gimbal
item.description: The Osmo Pocket 3P will feature a main wide camera and 3x zoom lens.

item.title: ‘They fixed everything’ — Honor quietly launched the best mid-range Android tablet I’ve ever tested
item.description: The Honor MagicPad 4 impresses with its stylish, thin design, excellent specs, and incredible value for money.

item.title: Apple’s education discount now requires proof that you’re a student
item.description: Apple now requires proof of eligibility from US customers who purchase products online at discounted education rates, which also apply to the Apple Watch for the first time. According to a new pop-up message displayed on Apple's education webstore, Apple is directing students, parents, and teachers to verify their status via Unidays' third-party verification service […]...

item.title: Xbox plans to share more on its next console, Project Helix, 'later this year'
item.description: More new on the next Xbox, Project Helix, has been confirmed for later this year.

item.title: Sony wants TSMC's help to make image sensors
item.description: It's teaming up with the chip giant on a new facility.

item.title: 'The stakes are high: a misconfigured payment flow doesn’t just produce a bad answer, it moves real money': Amazon Bedrock teams up with Coinbase and Stripe to let AI agents carry out transactions using stablecoins
item.description: AWS knows AI agents will be making payments for us in the future – and the first step starts with agent-to-agent micropayments.

item.title: How Ask Jeeves blew it
item.description: The early search engine had a beloved brand and prescient goals. Then it trashed them—right before they might really have gone places. Hello again, and welcome back to Fast Company’s Plugged In.

item.title: Avec la Coros Apex 2, les sportifs peuvent acquérir une montre connectée complète à moins de 300 euros
item.description: La Coros Apex 2 est une montre qui s'adresse avant tout aux sportifs avec des programmes d'entraînement dédiés à différentes activités, dont la course à pied. Pour la découvrir à moindre prix, cela se passe chez Amazon où elle est affichée à 299,99 euros.

item.title: ‘Google is not collaborative and not in the spirit of complying with this regulation’ – can the EU Commission strong-arm Google into levelling the playing field of the search engine market, and is this really in the interest of your privacy?
item.description: With the Digital Market Act (DMA), the EU made its intention to end Google's market dominance clear. While some are already cheering the push for our Search data to be shared with hopefully better alternative services, others fear this could create more harm than good. The truth may lie in the middle.

item.title: The Best Mobile Gaming Controllers for iPhone and Android (2026)
item.description: Your iPhone or Android phone can work overtime as a full-on gaming console with the help of these mobile controllers. Backbone makes my favorite.

item.title: How to watch Giro d'Italia 2026 — it's *FREE*
item.description: Here's how you can watch every stage of the 2026 Giro d'Italia for free as Jonas Vingegaard looks to win the only Grand Tour yet on his resume.

item.title: The AI productivity playbook: tips and tools for you
item.description:
Fast Company’s Harry McCracken and Jared Newman take you on a guided tour of the new AI tools that are making their work lives easier.
Fast Company’s global tech editor Harry McCracken and tech writer Jared Newman cut through the AI hype to walk you through the tools and techniques that are making a difference in the way they work. In this conversation, they break down the trends behind 2026’s most forward-thinking organizations and share the practical, steal‑worthy strategies that leaders at all levels can apply right now. Whether you’re refining your road map or scanning the horizon for wha...

item.title: Kalshi’s $22 billion problem
item.description: The prediction market giant just hit a massive valuation. But state gambling regulators are coming after its sports business—and using Kalshi’s own marketing materials to help make their case. Grant Mainland had a tough day at the office earlier this week. A lawyer representing the prediction markets platform Kalshi, Mainland appeared before the Massachusetts Supreme Judicial Court on May 4 with an unenviable task: persuading the justices that a company that has literally advertised itself as the “first app for legal sports betting in all 50 states” is not, technically speaking, offering peopl...

item.title: Static network baselines won't survive agentic AI
item.description: As AI systems act with greater autonomy, continuous learning and context become essential.

item.title: Nintendo announces price increase for Switch 2 handheld — but you still have time to beat it
item.description: Rumors have long suggested that Nintendo would ultimately increase the Switch 2 price, and unfortunately, that day has indeed arrived.

item.title: Google TV is getting the exact home screen update you don’t want: more clutter — vertical social videos from YouTube will be piped right to your eyes along with the TV and movie recommendations
item.description: Because there's nothing better than Tik-Tok-style vertical video on a widescreen landscape TV…

item.title: The Morning After: Google's new wearable doesn't have a screen
item.description: This week's biggest stories, including: Google's new wearable, the new reMarkable slate and a new gimbal from DJI.

item.title: Customer Education: Tech’s missing growth engine
item.description: Proactive customer education is often overlooked, but is key to growing customer loyalty and retention.

item.title: The Magic: The Gathering The Hobbit Play Booster Box is way below market price at Amazon — save over $10
item.description: Preorder the Magic: The Gathering The Hobbit Play Booster Box for $209.70 at Amazon, over $15 below TCGplayer's market price.

item.title: Google is turning Gemini into a 24/7 AI agent that plans your life for you
item.description: Google is pushing Gemini to become an AI agent for organizing lives

item.title: We Asked Coffee Pros to Blind Test Coffee Machines. The Results Were Surprising
item.description: For our latest WIRED Blind Test, we sat coffee industry professionals down to rank leading do-it-all coffee machines—and the winner wasn't what anyone expected.

item.title: AI’s got a brand problem. The CEOs aren’t helping
item.description: Most companies want to sell you on their product. AI companies do too. They just have a funny way of doing it. Artificial intelligence—surely the most hyped technological development to seize the spotlight in a generation—does not appear to be very popular with the American public. A clear majority recognize AI is a big deal, but recent Pew Research Center polling found more concern than excitement, particularly in its impact on creativity and relationships. Quinnipiac surveys find opinions souring even as usage rises. ...

item.title: Sony A7R VI : 67 mégapixels en vue, l’annonce officielle tombe le 13 mai
item.description: Sony donne rendez-vous le mercredi 13 mai pour officialiser son nouvel hybride plein format A7R VI. Les fuites parlent déjà d'un capteur de 67 mégapixels et d'une facture qui s'envole.

item.title: Mothers Day 2026 deals: Score free food from Denny’s, Pizza Hut, Dunkin, and more
item.description: Celebrate Mother's Day with the best free food deals from a number of popular restaurants, including Denny’s, Pizza Hut, Dunkin', and more.

item.title: AI: The difference between augmenting and transforming your business
item.description: Is your company's current AI approach a strategic advantage or a chaotic, unmanaged liability?

item.title: Daily Show host Desi Lydic roasts Trumps predictably weird Mothers Day tribute
item.description: "Daily Show" host Desi Lydic has mocked the speech Donald Trump made during his recent Mother's Day event paying tribute to military mothers.

item.title: Billie Eilish Doesn't Know if There Will Ever Be Another Billie Eilish
item.description: In an interview with WIRED ahead of her new concert film Hit Me Hard and Soft: The Tour (Live in 3D), Billie Eilish talked about whether or not future artists will be able to leverage SoundCloud the way she did.

item.title: 'Taylor Sheridan's got his hands all over this show': Dutton Ranch stars on 'ups and downs' of filming Yellowstone spinoff as showrunner Chad Feehan exits show weeks before Paramount+ release date
item.description: Dutton Ranch hasn't even aired yet, but showrunner Chad Feehan has exited from the show. Thankfully, its lead stars have confirmed that Taylor Sheridan has still been heavily involved.
